title: uniface.OccurrenceCreationException
text: uniface.OccurrenceCreationException Exception thrown if the occurrence could not be created. Description This exception is thrown if the entity contains fields for which the Is Static and Is Control property set to F and it is read-only, either because the field syntax is read-only or the widget is read-only. Related Links Read-Only Fields in Dynamic Server Pages In dynamic server pages, read-only fields are protected, so they cannot be changed in the browser. This can also prevent the JavaScript API function createOccurrence from creating new occurrences in the browser. APIs: DSP Client-Side JavaScript The Uniface JavaScript API is a collection of object-oriented programming interfaces that can be used in dynamic server pages (DSPs) to manipulate Uniface data objects in the browser, without round-trip processing to the server.
